title: Little Big Adventure
notes: Enhanced edition does not start with an "Assertion Failed" error. Original edition runs perfectly.
Enhanced edition throws two asserts, which can be ignored, but the game will only show a blank screen. Original edition works in dosbox but has very cumbersome controls.
